name: Smores Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together crumbs, margarine, and sugar in a small bowl; press onto the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill.
2. Stir together cream cheese and melted chocolate in a small bowl until well blended; pour into crust. Sprinkle with chopped chocolate.
3. Fold marshmallows into whipped topping; spread over cheesecake. Chill.
Makes 10-12 servings
Note: Chill candy bar before chopping.
From: Favorite Recipes 'Philadelphia Cream Cheese' all new simple & elegant recipes
